message:
refactor: Remove AVX-512 disable flags, let libdeflate use runtime CPU detection

Instead of disabling AVX-512 at compile-time, let libdeflate compile all
implementations (AVX-512, AVX2, SSE, scalar) and use runtime CPU detection
to pick the best available path via arch_select_adler32_func().

Benefits:
- Modern CPUs with AVX-512: Get full performance
- Older CPUs without AVX-512: Automatically fall back to AVX2/SSE
- Each machine gets optimal performance for its CPU

This approach relies on libdeflate's built-in runtime detection rather than
preprocessor macros. If CI compiler fails to compile AVX-512 intrinsics, we'll
need to add the disable flags back.

Removed from both:
- build.zig: Simplified libdeflate_flags (removed x86 conditionals)
- incremental.zig: Removed preprocessor macros from addCSourceFiles()
